Andhra Pradesh.insight: Spice-led regional flavors dominate conversations, significantly outperforming mainstream sweet profiles.
Andhra Pradesh.takeaway: What this means: Distinctive regional flavor equities increasingly drive snack conversation leadership.

trends.sweet: Steady growth with jaggery flavors accelerating faster than traditional sweets.
trends.savory: Gunpowder and Gongura create sustained leadership with widening volume gaps.
